summary: Verified bug fix: Strategy calls are now correctly excluded from mentor feedback prompts. All 8 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix verified: /mentor-dashboard/sessions/past (line 565-572) correctly excludes strategy calls using session_type filter
Fix verified: /mentor-dashboard/stats (line 185-189) correctly excludes strategy calls from pending_feedbacks count
Fix verified: /mentor-dashboard/sessions/pending-feedback (line 677-684) correctly excludes strategy calls
Fix verified: /feedback/pending-mandatory (line 105 for mentors, line 167 for candidates) correctly excludes strategy calls
All endpoints use consistent filter: session_type: {$nin: ['Strategy Call', 'strategy_call', 'Strategy call']}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Strategy call feedback exclusion bug is fixed and verified. Strategy calls no longer appear in mentor's past sessions requiring feedback, pending feedback count, or mandatory feedback prompts.

past_sessions_excludes_strategy_calls.evidence: No strategy calls returned in past sessions list

pending_feedback_sessions_excludes_strat.evidence: No strategy calls in pending feedback list

mandatory_feedback_excludes_strategy_cal.evidence: Strategy calls don't trigger mandatory feedback prompts for mentors or candidates

upcoming_sessions_still_includes_strateg.evidence: Strategy calls still appear in upcoming sessions (correct behavior)

bug_fix_summary.issue: Mentors were seeing strategy calls in their past sessions requiring feedback
bug_fix_summary.root_cause: session_type filter was missing from /sessions/past and /stats endpoints
bug_fix_summary.fix_applied: Added session_type: {$nin: ['Strategy Call', 'strategy_call', 'Strategy call']} filter to exclude strategy calls
